feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Community
feed.subtitle: SAP Community Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: how to find the field length in SAP s4 hana Public cloud edition
entry.content: how to find the field length in SAP s4 hana Public cloud edition

entry.title: District field on Customer adress no translation (field CITY2)
entry.content:
Dear all

 

I am in charge of creation of new postal code / city code and district for Thailand. 

Is there possibility to key District name (field CITY2) in different language (EN and TH fo instance ? ) . 

thanks for your answer.

entry.title: SAP Community Network always refreshing with FireFox 129.0.2
entry.content:
Hello all,

Since a few days ago whenever I go into any SCN post using Firefox the tab keeps refreshing infinitely. At first I thought it was an issue with my mouse but it doesn't happen with Edge or Chrome.

Today I deleted all cookies, temp files and history and still happens.

Is anyone else experiencing the same issue? 

Thanks in advance 🙂

entry.title: EWM How to delete incorrectly created Party Entitled to Dispose
entry.content:
Hello,

We have created in error Party Entitled to Dispose, this is causing errors when Internal PO's are being created. 

How can we delete these entries? 

many thanks in advance

entry.title: Offloading XLSX and DOCX document attachments from ECC and loading them to S4
entry.content:
Trying to download document attachments from ECC and load them to S4.
We run a custom download program on the ECC side. Assuming type is BKPF:
  Step1. Call method cl_binary_relation=>read_links to read existing attachments using awkey.
  Step2. Loop thru the links and read them via call FM SO_DOCUMENT_READ_API1.
  Step3. With filetype BIN, call FM GUI_DOWNLOAD with the hex output from step 2.

On the S4 side:
  Step1. Call function 'GUI_UPLOAD' to read the downloaded files from the extract, with filetype ‘BIN’ .
  Step2. Call FM SO_DOCUMENT_INSERT.
  Step3. Call method cl_binary_relation=>create_link

All the downloaded files are “successfully” attached to the document.
If you check the attachments in FB03, it works fine with PDF, XLS, DOC files, but does not work with XLSX and DOCX.
When opening an XLSX we get this as if it was opened in Notepad.

Also, if we open a downloaded XLSX directly from the output folder:

Thanks

Leo

entry.title: Filtering on smart table - Tree Table works only on Level 0
entry.content:
The requirement is to filter a smart table - tree table for 'code' and display the entire parent hierarchy of that node. 
We use default personalisation on the smart table, but it works only on level 0. 
This is the call being made
GET Category?$filter=level%20eq%200%20and%20(name%20eq%20%27Pulp%27)&$select=code%2cname%2cstatus%2cspend%2clevel%2cparent_code%2cdrillState&$skip=0&$top=110&$inlinecount=allpages

The filter level 0 is added by default and is only filtering level 0. How do I make it level agnostic and also get its parent node as well. Is there any customisation of the query that can be made?

entry.title: SAP Community 2024 accepts URL to one Website which goes to another Website
entry.content:
Hi, SAP Community 2024 doesn't prevent URL texts from being "https://..." or "http://..." which are different from the actual URL.

e.g. today https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-discussions/problem-with-function-module-ms-word-ole-formletter-for-creating-form/m-p/13806086#M2030389 let thinks that https://github.com/... goes to https://github.com/... but it goes to somewhere else as you can see:

Could SAP Community 2024 forbid https/http texts of URLs which are different from the URL?

To clarify:

Thank you.

Sandra

entry.title: What is the effect of transferring or selling product without doing invoices verification
entry.content: What is the effect of transferring or selling product without invoice verification is not done for the received product from suppliers

entry.title: Seeking Advice on AI and Communication-Related Topics for Master’s Thesis
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I’m currently pursuing a Master’s in Media and Communication and working as a student at SAP. I’m planning to focus my thesis on the intersection of AI and communication, particularly within the SAP ecosystem.

I’m looking for suggestions on relevant and impactful thesis topics in this area. If anyone has ideas or knows of any SAP teams working on AI-driven communication strategies, I’d appreciate your guidance or connection.

Thanks in advance for your help!

Best,

Yasaman Jalaei

entry.title: Lable using DYMO printer need to print in Landscape or rotate into 90 degree
entry.content:
Hello All,

I have created lable using smartforms & printing this with the help of DYMO printer.

Currently this text is print in horizontally, We need in Vertical or landscape mode.

Please help & tell us any suggestion.

PFA.

 

Thanks & Regards,

Anjali Gore.

entry.title: SAC User ID activation
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I am relatively new to SAC, appreciate any help/suggestions on how to proceed.

In SAC we have a user account not associated with any user but is a service account created to receive import job failure alerts which in turn has a forwarding rule to internal incident creation tool to automatically create incidents.

User ID's are activated via email through IdP service(Ockta).

but for service account since we do not need to give user level access, certain configurations are not maintained, such as user log in through Ockta.

Is there a way to activate SAC account without needing to click on the activation link?

Or does SAC have a way to create a service account to be able to receive alert emails.

Thank you

entry.title: Crystal Reports 14 in (unmanaged) C++
entry.content:
I have a Windows C++ application that is using Crystal Reports XI, and I want to upgrade to Crystal Reports 14. In my current application, we are getting the CLSID which we are passing to CoCreateInstance like this:

CLSIDFromProgID (L"CrystalRuntime.Application.11", &CLSID_Application);

I have installed Crystal Reports 2020 via the file: 
CR202004P_600-70005715.EXE

When I look at the Registry Keys under HKEY_CLASSES_ROOT, I see no key for CrystalReport14 that is similiar to CrystalRuntime.Application.11. What is the right key/ProgId of Crystal Reports 14 to call CLSIDFromProgID? Are there any additional things I need to download? 


These are the installations of my computer:
Operating system: Windows 10 Pro
IDE: Microsoft Visual Studio 2010, Version 10.0.40219.1 SP1Rel
Microsoft .NET Framework 4.7.02558 SP1Rel

Thank you very much in advance.

entry.title: We need an ask a question button.
entry.content:
Hi  Masters,

SAP Community has changed its design and moved to a new site. On the previous site, I could easily find the "ask a question" button. I could go to my profile and find the questions I had asked. Now I can't do any of these things.

To ask a question (to open a new question), I can go to the question I have asked before and do this in the small area on the right. This area only appears in a question I have asked. I can't access it from anywhere else.

Can't we create a single ask a question button? Am I the only one having this problem?

 

 

On the previous site, I could access "my questions" from my profile. Now that is gone.

 

Am I the only one having this problem?

 

Thanks .

entry.title: We are considering the option of implementing a promotion action within the same position.
entry.content:
We are considering the option of implementing a promotion action within the same position.

Could you please let us know if this is feasible? If so, we would appreciate guidance on how to apply it and any best practices to follow.

entry.title: MDK Application not showing two date picker control side by side in page, what to do?
entry.content:
Hello,

I am currently developing an application using the SAP Mobile Development Kit (MDK). I have encountered an issue where I am unable to display two date picker controls side by side on the same page.

Here are the details of my setup:

MDK Version: 24.7
Device/Platform: Web, Android
Steps to Reproduce:
1)Added two date picker controls to the same page.
2)Tried using "NumberOfColumns" property of FormCellControl as 2 to show two date side by side.
3)In cloud studio it showing two date shows side by side.
4)Despite these efforts, the date pickers still appear one below the other instead of side by side in both web as well as android.

Page Code : 

{
    "Controls": [
        {
            "FilterFeedbackBar": {
                "ShowAllFilters": false,
                "_Type": "Control.Type.FilterFeedbackBar"
            },
            "_Type": "Control.Type.SectionedTable",
            "_Name": "SectionedTable0",
            "Sections": [
                {
                    "Visible": true,
                    "EmptySection": {
                        "FooterVisible": false
                    },
                    "Separators": {
                        "TopSectionSeparator": false,
                        "BottomSectionSeparator": true,
                        "HeaderSeparator": true,
                        "FooterSeparator": true,
                        "ControlSeparator": true
                    },
                    "_Type": "Section.Type.FormCell",
                    "_Name": "SectionFormCell1",
                    "Controls": [
                        {
                            "Value": "Enter Date",
                            "_Type": "Control.Type.FormCell.DatePicker",
                            "_Name": "FormCellDatePicker0",
                            "IsVisible": true,
                            "Separator": true,
                            "Caption": "Start",
                            "IsEditable": true,
                            "Mode": "Date"
                        },
                        {
                            "Value": "Enter Date",
                            "_Type": "Control.Type.FormCell.DatePicker",
                            "_Name": "FormCellDatePicker1",
                            "IsVisible": true,
                            "Separator": true,
                            "Caption": "End",
                            "IsEditable": true,
                            "Mode": "Date"
                        }
                    ],
                    "Layout": {
                        "NumberOfColumns": 2
                    }
                },
                {
                    "_Type": "Section.Type.ButtonTable",
                    "_Name": "SectionButtonTable0",
                    "Visible": true,
                    "EmptySection": {
                        "FooterVisible": false
                    },
                    "Separators": {
                        "TopSectionSeparator": false,
                        "BottomSectionSeparator": true,
                        "HeaderSeparator": true,
                        "FooterSeparator": true,
                        "ControlSeparator": true
                    },
                    "Buttons": [
                        {
                            "_Type": "ButtonTable.Type.Button",
                            "_Name": "ButtonTableTypeButton0",
                            "Title": "Submit",
                            "Alignment": "Center",
                            "ButtonType": "Primary",
                            "Semantic": "Tint",
                            "ImagePosition": "Leading",
                            "FullWidth": true,
                            "Visible": true,
                            "Enabled": true
                        }
                    ],
                    "Layout": {
                        "LayoutType": "Vertical",
                        "HorizontalAlignment": "Leading"
                    }
                }
            ]
        }
    ],
    "_Type": "Page",
    "_Name": "Test",
    "Caption": "Test",
    "PrefersLargeCaption": true
}

Has anyone faced a similar issue or can provide guidance on how to resolve this? Any help or suggestions would be greatly appreciated!

Thank you.

entry.title: Password policy update on SAP netweaver
entry.content:
Hi all, anyone could answer this. If I apply a new password policy in SAP NetWeaver such as the minimum password length, expiration time, password history size, and maximum idle time, it will have affect in any integrated systems users like those using the CUST_USER_ADMIN_ROLE that access the HANA database, etc?

Does it force to update their own password?

Thank you,

Best regards,

-Jaspher

entry.title: TESM and LRDTSA Calculation Methods in Intelligent Forecast
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a case I try on SAP B1 Hana to test Intelligent Forecast and done following steps:

1- First add sales order from 1/1/2024 to 12/8/2024 by following Quantity as steps (11-12-14-15-18-24-26-28-30) and added in start date 1/9/2024 End Date 31/12/2024, and set monthly on view and set item in Item No. that added transaction in sales order , then choose intelligent forecast 

2- choose Maximum History time buckets 30 and then add forecast the LRDSTA calc method show as standard, despite I choose standard calc Method 

I have 2 question :

1-why appear  LRDSTA calc method show as standard, despite I choose standard calc Method 

2- How TESM and LRDTSA working when i choose Maximum History time Buckets by months cause when i choose TESM the table forecast as months from September to December is deferent

Could you please tell me how the equation works, and why the results is calculate deferent when i fixed all data and run forecast again?

and how TESM and LRDTSA working when change alpha &beta& gama

    

when I choose Alpha beta and Gama or is set to 0.001 the total quantity change as capture

entry.title: Upload .XML file to CPI endpoint
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a scenario that want to upload XML file to CPI Endpoint. Is it possible or not? If it is possible please suggest

entry.title: Cold Store connection name change while importing the ADSO in BW4HANA
entry.content:
In the ADSO Data Tiering properties, we can enable the hot, warm and cold tiers. While selecting the cold tier, system asks for the Cold Store connection name. We have set the connection name in DEV as SAPIQDEV but the cold store connection name is different in QA environment which is SAPIQQA but while importing the ADSO from DEV to QA, the transport is failing with the message that the connection with the name SAPIQDEV does not exist. 

Is there a way where the connection name is changed automatically while importing the ADSO i.e., from SAPIQDEV to SAPIQQA?

Thanks

entry.title: Install S4HANA 2023 - Instance S4H/D10 reached state STOP after having state STARTING. Giving up.
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I has issue when installed S4HANA 2023 and HANA Database in one host.

Kindly please your advice.

Detail issue on below, and please find the attachment.

An error occurred while processing option SAP S/4HANA Server 2023 > SAP HANA Database > Installation > Application Server ABAP > Standard System > Standard System (Last error reported by the step: Instance S4H/D10 reached state STOP after having state STARTING. Giving up). You can now:

Choose Retry
to repeat the current step.
Choose Log Files
to get more information about the error.
Stop the option and continue later.

Log files are written to /tmp/sapinst_instdir/S4HANA2023/CORE/HDB/INSTALL/STD/ABAP.

R3trans -d
This is R3trans version 6.27 (release 793 - 12.06.24 - 09:07:06).
unicode enabled version
R3trans finished (0000).
